task_completion.description: Open NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Builder and name the strategy 'MACrossover'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Builder wizard is open, and the 'Name' field is filled with 'MACrossover'.

task_completion.description: Add a condition for SMA(10) crossing above SMA(30)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Conditions and Actions' screen of the Strategy Builder, there is a condition indicating that an SMA with a period of 10 crosses above an SMA with a period of 30 (e.g., CrossAbove(SMA(10), SMA(30))).

task_completion.description: Add an action to enter a long position when the CrossAbove condition is met
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the CrossAbove condition in the Strategy Builder, there is an action configured to 'Enter long position' or 'EnterLong'.

task_completion.description: Add a condition for SMA(10) crossing below SMA(30)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Conditions and Actions' screen, there is a second condition set indicating that an SMA with a period of 10 crosses below an SMA with a period of 30 (e.g., CrossBelow(SMA(10), SMA(30))).

task_completion.description: Add an action to enter a short position when the CrossBelow condition is met
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the CrossBelow condition in the Strategy Builder, there is an action configured to 'Enter short position' or 'EnterShort'.

task_completion.description: Compile the strategy and ensure it is saved in the custom strategies folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Builder wizard is completed/finished, and either a compilation success indicator is shown in NinjaTrader 8, or a file explorer/terminal shows 'MACrossover.cs' exists at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\bin\Custom\Strategies\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Builder GUI to create the strategy
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the NinjaTrader 8 Strategy Builder wizard dialogs (e.g., setting up conditions and actions visually) rather than just opening a text editor or using terminal commands to write the C# file.

integrity.description: The strategy was compiled using NinjaTrader 8's built-in compiler
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Compile' or 'Finish' within the NinjaTrader 8 interface, or the NinjaTrader 8 script editor is shown compiling the script without errors, rather than just placing a text file in the directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or download a pre-made MACrossover.cs file
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step construction of the strategy logic (adding SMAs, setting periods to 10 and 30) rather than a sudden appearance of the completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a compiled C# strategy file named 'MACrossover.cs' located exactly at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\bin\Custom\Strategies\MACrossover.cs'. The generated code must contain the class 'MACrossover', use 'SMA(10)' and 'SMA(30)', and utilize the 'CrossAbove' method to trigger 'EnterLong' and the 'CrossBelow' method to trigger 'EnterShort'.
